creator: j@uriah.heep.sax.de
text:
p.s.: While the original submitter could only observe this problem on
files of 1 MiB or more, I can even observe it on raw JPEG images from
a digicam, sized about 250 KiB.

I also observed that the corrupted read data sometimes contain strings
which are simply not part of the SD card itself, like filenames
starting with /usr/local.  My suspicion is that this curruption is
somehow introduced by mmap issues.

-- 
cheers, J"org               .-.-.   --... ...--   -.. .  DL8DTL

http://www.sax.de/~joerg/                        NIC: JW11-RIPE
Never trust an operating system you don't have sources for. ;-)
